description: Implement the parent-owned API/service/schema behavior for rewards summary, objectives detail, progress handling, and reward presentation flows.

items.description: Inventory repo reality for current routers, schemas, services, repositories, and frontend-dependent surfaces related to rewards/objectives before adding endpoints.
steps: Search for any existing rewards/objectives-related routers/services/repositories/tests.
Map the existing rewards/objectives frontend expectations to parent backend API surfaces.

items.description: Add parent rewards summary read APIs for the dashboard/rewards page summary surface.
steps: Implement summary routes/services/schemas/repository calls for current points, current tier, next milestone, and active perks summary.
Keep parent-owned aggregation separate from Pay.

items.description: Add objectives detail APIs supporting organized objective listing, progress, reward details, and milestone-objective linkage.
steps: Support organized presentation for milestone objectives and subscription/tier/product-specific objectives.

items.description: Add queued completion/reward presentation APIs or service flows needed for notifications, seen state, skip-all handling, and ordered reveal behavior.
steps: Implement the parent backend behavior for queued objective completion presentation.
Support ordered reveal, seen/consumed state, and skip-all transitions.

items.description: Add service-layer progression/reversal scaffolding needed to support points and reward changes from future triggers without hardcoding unsupported trigger sources.
steps: Create internal service-layer primitives for award, reverse, complete-objective, and queue-presentation behavior.
Do not overbuild external trigger orchestration not yet in scope.

items.description: Add API/application tests covering rewards summary, objectives detail, notification queue behavior, and core service-layer progression flows.
steps: Add/update integration and unit tests for the rewards API/application layer.

items.description: Run the authoritative docker test suite and mark this spec complete only when green.
steps: Run the full authoritative docker test suite.
Only mark this item complete when green.
